sunoRequest.negativeTags: vocals, singing, lyrics, heavy metal, distorted guitar, rap, dissonant, dark ambient, sad, acoustic folk
sunoRequest.prompt: An expansive instrumental score that opens with a subtle ambient synth pad and gentle piano arpeggio, evoking the spark of bold ideas. As the track unfolds, warm strings and soft electronic pulses intertwine, building a sense of innovation and forward motion. Light percussion—organic taiko drums and modern electronic rhythms—drives the progression, while a triumphant brass motif emerges to underscore visionary breakthroughs. Mid-section textures incorporate shimmering synth leads that soar above a growing orchestral foundation, reflecting the transition from electric cars to rockets bound for Mars. The composition crescendos into a powerful finale with sweeping strings, galloping percussion, and radiant electronic accents, capturing the destiny of pushing humanity forward without a hint of vocal or lyrical content.
sunoRequest.style: Epic Cinematic Orchestral with Electronic Elements
sunoRequest.title: Horizons Unbound

videoMainSubject: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX
masterStylePositivePrompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, oil painting, watercolor, sketchy, stylized, abstract, soft focus, low resolution, pixelated, noisy, grainy, text, watermark

sceneDataList.narration: Elon Musk is changing the world, one groundbreaking idea at a time.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, stands in a modern sleek office environment beside a larger-than-life illuminated globe, his mouth gently closed in a focused expression, photorealistic master illustration rendered in ultra-high 8K resolution with DSLR-quality precision; natural soft dynamic lighting casts subtle yet dramatic shadows across lifelike textures of his tailored suit and the globe’s surface, while glowing abstract icons—lightbulbs, circuit diagrams, rocket silhouettes, electric vehicle symbols—float organically around him, casting faint colored glows onto his face; true-to-life balanced color palette, rich depth of field isolating him in sharp focus against a softly blurred background, capturing impeccable realism and immersive authenticity in a vertical portrait composition.
sceneDataList.videoGenPrompt: slow smooth dolly-in toward subject, gentle 360° orbiting camera around subject, subtle parallax shift of background layers, continuous slow rotation of illuminated globe, abstract icons drifting organically around globe and subject with soft bobbing and glow pulsation, smooth follow-focus on finger pointing gesture, slight head turn and chin lift, dynamic lighting shifts tied to camera motion
sceneDataList.videoGenNegativePrompt: hair clipping through body, icons intersecting suit, globe texture tearing, jerky movement, stuttering, unnatural speed changes, motion blur ghosting, abrupt lighting flicker
sceneDataList.imageGenPromptDirective: An entrepreneur stands beside a large globe while glowing abstract icons representing ideas float around him

sceneDataList.narration: From electric cars to space travel, his vision knows no bounds.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Portrait composition, photorealistic master illustration rendered with DSLR-quality precision and ultra-high 8K resolution, natural lighting casting soft yet dynamic shadows, true-to-life color palette and balanced tones: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, stands in the lower third with a closed-mouth, thoughtful expression, hands loosely clasped, observing a sleek metallic blue Tesla Model S midair as its rear panels peel back and transform into a silver spacecraft fuselage with rocket nozzles emerging. Crisp clarity and rich depth of field highlight the lifelike textures of the car’s carbon-fiber body and the spacecraft’s engineered details, while a clear sky backdrop and subtle atmospheric haze emphasize the seamless transition from electric car to space vehicle.
sceneDataList.videoGenPrompt: slow camera dolly upward from Elon’s torso to the floating car, gentle upward tilt and slight parallax shift between foreground and background, seamless unfolding of the Tesla’s rear panels with smooth easing, rocket nozzles extending outward with gradual acceleration, soft ignition glow ramping up into subtle exhaust plume, minimal head tilt and breathing motion on the subject, drifting atmospheric haze and slow-moving clouds in the background

sceneDataList.narration: He founded Tesla, revolutionizing the auto industry with sustainable energy solutions.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Vertical framing, portrait composition of Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, standing with a focused, closed-mouth expression in a cutting-edge electric vehicle assembly line, watching as robotic arms install a high-voltage battery pack into a sleek Tesla chassis—a visual homage to how he founded Tesla and revolutionized the auto industry with sustainable energy solutions. Photorealistic master illustration with DSLR-quality precision and ultra-high 8K resolution, natural soft lighting casting dynamic shadows across polished steel, carbon fiber, and glossy paint surfaces, balanced true-to-life colors and realistic contrasts. Crisp clarity and rich depth of field highlight every lifelike texture while advanced machinery, conveyor belts, and illuminated control terminals gently blur into the authentic industrial background.
sceneDataList.videoGenPrompt: vertical framing, slow smooth dolly-in from car’s front bumper toward Elon’s torso, gentle upward tilt to reveal robotic arm at work, subtle left-to-right tracking arc around the assembly line, smooth rack focus shifting from high-voltage battery pack insertion to Elon’s chest rising and falling with quiet breathing, conveyor belt gliding steadily in the background, robotic arm executing precise, cyclical insertion motion, soft pulsing of overhead LED panels, minimal head tilt and slight blink timed to the rack focus transition

sceneDataList.narration: With SpaceX, he aims to make human life multiplanetary, targeting Mars.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Hyper-detailed photorealistic master illustration of Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, in portrait composition: he stands near the launch pad with mouth closed, wearing a tailored dark blue flight jacket adorned with subtle abstract mission insignias, gazing resolutely as a gleaming white rocket ignites behind him, its fiery exhaust plume trailing upward toward a distant red planet on the horizon. Rendered in ultra-high 8K resolution with DSLR-quality precision and professional photography aesthetics, natural light bathes the scene in soft yet dynamic shadows that reveal lifelike textures on the metal launch tower and dusty ground, while a shallow depth of field keeps both Musk and the ascending rocket sharply in focus against a softly blurred sky. The true-to-life color palette and balanced contrast highlight the metallic sheen of the vehicle and the warm red hues of the planet, creating an immersive, authentic atmosphere that captures his vision of making human life multiplanetary.
sceneDataList.videoGenPrompt: slow right-to-left dolly revealing the portrait and launch pad, gentle upward tilt to track the rocket ascent, subtle handheld vibration timed with engine ignition, controlled motion blur on the exhaust plume, soft heat-haze shimmer around the flames, swirling dust and smoke at ground level, minimal hair and jacket flutter from blast wind, smooth ease-in and ease-out transitions
sceneDataList.videoGenNegativePrompt: hair clipping through head, jacket mesh popping, exhaust plume clipping into ground, excessive camera jitter, stuttering frames, abrupt speed changes, motion blur ghosting, unnatural slow-motion, drifting off-frame, uneven focus shifts
sceneDataList.imageGenPromptDirective: A rocket launches from a pad toward a distant red planet on the horizon as a person watches the ascent

sceneDataList.narration: Musk is not just a CEO—he's a pioneer pushing humanity forward.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, captured in a photorealistic master illustration with DSLR-quality precision and ultra-high 8K resolution, stands in portrait composition with one hand raised, palm open toward the sky, his expression calm with a closed mouth. Natural sunlight filters from above, casting soft yet dynamic shadows across the tailored suit and textured skin, revealing intricate details like subtle stubble and the weave of his jacket. In front of him, semi-transparent abstract human silhouettes float upward in an elegant arc, each form softly illuminated to symbolize human progress. The true-to-life color palette features balanced tones and realistic contrasts, with crisp clarity on Musk’s features and the ascending figures, while a gently blurred futuristic cityscape in the background adds immersive depth.
sceneDataList.videoGenPrompt: slow, smooth push-in camera dolly toward the subject over 3–4 seconds; gentle upward tilt of camera following the floating silhouettes; semi-transparent human figures gracefully drift upward in an elegant arc with subtle ease-in/ease-out timing; faint parallax shift of the blurred cityscape in the background; soft, drifting lens flare glints across the raised hand; micro-movements in the fingers and slight head tilt with natural breathing rhythm
sceneDataList.videoGenNegativePrompt: jerky movement, stuttering, unnatural speed changes, abrupt focus shifts, camera bounce, silhouettes clipping through the suit, silhouette ghosting or popping, hair clipping through body, flickering shadows, parallax distortion, over-exaggerated facial or hand animations
sceneDataList.imageGenPromptDirective: An entrepreneur stands with one hand raised, abstract human figures floating upward in front of him representing progress

sunoRequest.negativeTags: vocals, singing, lyrics, heavy metal, country, rap, hip hop, dissonant, abrasive, lo-fi
sunoRequest.prompt: A stirring instrumental track blending a full symphonic orchestra with subtle electronic textures. It begins with a soft piano motif and warm ambient synth pads to reflect innovation and possibility as Musk stands before a glowing globe. As the narrative shifts to electric cars and rocket launches, gentle string tremolos and light percussion evolve into a driving rhythm with layered brass accents and shimmering electronic arpeggios, symbolizing an expanding vision. Approaching SpaceX’s Mars ambitions, timpani rolls and bold horn fanfares join rising string passages and futuristic synth leads, creating an epic sense of adventure and determination. The finale delivers a triumphant orchestral crescendo with soaring strings, triumphant brass, and rhythmic electronic pulses to evoke pioneering spirit and humanity’s forward progress. This track is purely instrumental with no vocals or lyrics.
sunoRequest.style: Cinematic Epic Orchestral with Electronic Elements
sunoRequest.title: Boundless Horizons

sceneDataList.narration: Musk is not just a CEO—he's a pioneer pushing humanity forward.
sceneDataList.imageGenPrompt: Portrait composition of Elon Musk, the CEO of SpaceX and Tesla, striding confidently forward along a sunlit path toward a glowing horizon, embodying the narration “Musk is not just a CEO—he’s a pioneer pushing humanity forward.” Rendered in a vibrant Japanese animation style with clean lineart and cel-shading, crisp bright lighting and subtle rim lights highlighting Musk’s determined form and his companions, using bold saturated hues of vibrant pinks, blues, and greens with soft pastel accents. Musk wears a smart navy blazer over a white shirt, with large expressive eyes and a closed mouth. A diverse group—a female engineer in goggles, a young student with a backpack, a healthcare worker in scrubs, and a casual farmer—follows in dynamic poses along rolling hills under a radiant sky. Smooth textures, flat shading, sharp defined edges, minimal gradients, and a stylized whimsical background create an energetic, adventurous atmosphere with balanced negative space.
